MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Rena Harel (Conservator).

Mr. Schultz reported that a supplement was filed yesterday, that they were still obtaining original financial statements which they should have in about three weeks. The Court continued the matter to December 4, 2007.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.
